name: Standard Table
description: Basic CRUD entity: fields, list view, detail view, simple relationships. ~2-4 hours.

name: Complex Table
description: Entity with status workflows, multiple relationships, validation logic, business rules. ~6-10 hours.

name: User Role
description: Role definition with permission scoping and access rules. ~2-3 hours per role.

name: Simple Workflow
description: Single-trigger automation (e.g., notification on status change). ~2-3 hours.

name: Complex Workflow
description: Multi-step automation with branching, scheduling, or escalation logic. ~6-8 hours.

name: Standard Integration
description: Well-documented API, single-direction sync (e.g., Stripe, QuickBooks read, email service). ~8-15 hours.

name: Complex Integration
description: Bidirectional, custom auth, or legacy API integration (e.g., HHAeXchange, EVV systems). ~20-40 hours.

name: AI Document Intelligence
description: Parse structured data from uploaded documents (credentials, IDs, licenses). ~12-20 hours.

name: AI Smart Matching
description: AI-driven recommendations or anomaly detection (caregiver matching, alert systems). ~15-25 hours.

name: AI Conversational Interface
description: Claude-powered chat interface for end users with structured tool calls. ~20-30 hours.

name: Standard Dashboard
description: KPI cards, charts, filtered list views. ~4-6 hours.

name: Complex Dashboard
description: Multi-source data with drill-downs, exports, complex filtering. ~8-12 hours.

name: Scheduled Report
description: Auto-generated PDF or email report on a cadence. ~3-5 hours.

name: Project Setup
description: Kickoff, environment provisioning, initial documentation, deployment pipeline. Flat per project.

name: Simple Data Migration
description: Clean CSV import with field mapping. Flat fee.

name: Complex Data Migration
description: Extract from existing system, clean, transform, validate. Flat fee.

name: Training Session
description: Live training session with prep, delivery, and recording. ~2-3 hours each.

name: Platform Base (Small)
description: Monthly platform fee for agencies under 50 caregivers/users. Includes hosting, support, ongoing maintenance.

name: Platform Base (Medium)
description: Monthly platform fee for agencies 50-150 caregivers. Includes hosting, support, ongoing maintenance.

name: Platform Base (Large)
description: Monthly platform fee for agencies 150-500 caregivers. Includes hosting, support, ongoing maintenance.

name: Platform Base (Enterprise)
description: Monthly platform fee for agencies 500+ caregivers. Includes hosting, support, dedicated attention. Custom pricing above base.

name: AI Usage Tier (Basic)
description: Monthly AI/API usage allowance for light document processing and basic conversational features.

name: AI Usage Tier (Heavy)
description: Monthly AI/API usage allowance for high-volume document intelligence and frequent AI feature use.

name: Premium Support Tier
description: Priority response times, dedicated support hours, monthly office hours.

name: Custom Line Item
description: Free-form line item. Name and price set per use.
